children.text: This model is shared between code generation (using RoMethod/RoType metadata reflection) and the runtime CapabilityDispatcher (using System.Reflection).
The capability represents a single exportable method that can be invoked via

summary.text: Gets or sets the capability ID (e.g., "Aspire.Hosting/addRedis").
Gets or sets the kind of capability (Method, PropertyGetter, PropertySetter, InstanceMethod).
Gets or sets the description of what this capability does.
Gets or sets the expanded list of concrete types this capability applies to. Pre-computed during scanning by resolving interface targets to all implementing types.

remarks.text: For flat codegen (Go, C): use this to put methods on each concrete builder. For inheritance codegen (TypeScript, Java): use

summary.text: Gets or sets the simple method name for generated SDKs (e.g., "addRedis", "isRunMode"). For context type capabilities, this is just the property/method name without the type prefix.
Gets or sets the owning type name for property/method capabilities.

remarks.text: For PropertyGetter, PropertySetter, and InstanceMethod capabilities, this is the type name that owns the property/method (e.g., "ExecutionContext"). For regular Method capabilities, this is null.

summary.text: Gets or sets the parameters for this capability.
Gets the qualified method name combining OwningTypeName and MethodName.

remarks.text: Returns "ExecutionContext.isRunMode" for property capabilities, or just "addRedis" for regular method capabilities.

Gets or sets the source location where this capability is defined.
Gets or sets the name of the target parameter (e.g., "builder", "resource"). This is the first parameter of the method that represents the target/receiver.
Gets or sets the target type reference with full type metadata.
Gets or sets the original (declared) ATS type ID that this capability targets. May be an interface type (e.g., "Aspire.Hosting/IResourceWithEnvironment").

summary.text: Contains all scanned types, capabilities, and metadata from ATS assembly scanning.

children.text: The ATS type system has three distinct categories of types, each with different serialization and code generation behavior:

description.text: Types marked with [AspireExport]. These are passed by reference using opaque handles. The TypeScript SDK generates wrapper classes that hold handles and proxy method calls back to .NET. Examples: IDistributedApplicationBuilder, ContainerResource, EndpointReference.

Types marked with [AspireDto]. These are serialized as JSON objects and passed by value. The TypeScript SDK generates interfaces matching the DTO's properties. Examples: CreateBuilderOptions, ResourceSnapshot.
Enum types discovered in capability signatures. These are serialized as strings. The TypeScript SDK generates TypeScript enums with string values.

summary.text: Gets the type category for a CLR type based on scanned data. Used at runtime for marshalling.

returns.text: The type category.

summary.text: Gets the capabilities discovered during scanning. Capabilities are methods or properties marked with [AspireExport] that can be invoked via RPC.
Gets any diagnostics (warnings/errors) generated during scanning.
Gets the DTO types discovered during scanning. These are types marked with [AspireDto] that are serialized as JSON objects. Code generators create interfaces for these types.
Gets the enum types discovered during scanning. These are enum types found in capability signatures, serialized as strings. Code generators create enum definitions for these types.
Gets the handle types discovered during scanning. These are types marked with [AspireExport] that are passed by reference using opaque handles. Code generators create wrapper classes for these types.
Runtime registry mapping capability IDs to methods.
Runtime registry mapping capability IDs to properties.
Represents a diagnostic message from the ATS capability scanner.

Gets or sets the type reference with full type metadata.
Categories of ATS types for serialization and handling.

enumMembers.name: Primitive
enumMembers.description: Primitive types that serialize directly to JSON values. Examples: string, number, boolean, datetime, guid.

enumMembers.name: Enum
enumMembers.description: Enum types that serialize as string values.

enumMembers.name: Handle
enumMembers.description: Handle types that are opaque references to .NET objects. Serialized as { "$handle": "type:id", "$type": "type" }.

enumMembers.name: Dto
enumMembers.description: Data Transfer Objects that serialize as JSON objects. Must be marked with [AspireDto].

enumMembers.name: Callback
enumMembers.description: Callback types (delegates) that are registered and invoked by ID.

enumMembers.name: Array
enumMembers.description: Readonly array/collection types that serialize as JSON arrays (copied). Examples: T[], IReadOnlyList<T>, IReadOnlyCollection<T>, IEnumerable<T>.

enumMembers.name: List
enumMembers.description: Mutable list types that are handles to .NET List<T>.

enumMembers.name: Dict
enumMembers.description: Dictionary types that serialize as JSON objects. Mutable dictionaries are handles; readonly dictionaries are copied.

enumMembers.name: Union
enumMembers.description: Union types that can hold one of multiple alternative types. Serialization depends on the member types.

enumMembers.name: Unknown
enumMembers.description: Unknown types that couldn't be resolved during the first pass of scanning. In Pass 2, these are either resolved to Handle (if the type is in the universe) or filtered out (if the type is not a valid ATS type).

summary.text: Represents type information discovered from [AspireExport(AtsTypeId = "...")].
Gets or sets the ATS type ID.

Gets or sets the base type hierarchy (from immediate base up to Resource/Object). Only populated for concrete (non-interface) types. Used for expanding capabilities targeting base types to derived types.
Gets or sets the CLR type reference for direct type access.
Gets or sets whether this type has [AspireExport(ExposeMethods = true)]. Types with this flag will have their methods exposed as capabilities.
Gets or sets whether this type has [AspireExport(ExposeProperties = true)]. Types with this flag will have their properties exposed as capabilities.
Gets or sets the interfaces this type implements. Only populated for concrete (non-interface) types.
Gets or sets whether this type is an interface.
Gets whether this handle type represents an Aspire resource type.

Gets or sets the ATS type ID (e.g., "string", "Aspire.Hosting/RedisResource").
Gets or sets the member types for Union category. When Category = Union, this contains the alternative types.
Gets or sets the value type reference for Dict types.
